summary: Tested D+D launch-day improvements (gallery schema, predictive search, title cleanup, TopBar). Backend: 49/49 pytest pass (27 regression + 22 new for search-suggest, clean-titles, gallery add/replace/delete, PUT imagen/imagenes sync, migration proof on 4.353 products, CSV upload populating imagenes). Frontend: TopBar visible on home with 'Retiros en Alcorta' + 'Envíos a Rosario y alrededores' and correctly hidden on /admin. Predictive search opens dropdown with 6 items typing 'mochila' and click navigates to PDP. PDP for SKU 6165090171123 shows 2 thumbnails, clicking thumb 2 swaps main image URL (6165090171123.webp → 6190010009446.webp). Admin · Gestionar row exposes Images button with counter (=2) that opens GalleryModal; add URL → 3 tiles, remove → back to 2, primary image is kept in sync. Admin · Herramientas has new 'Aplicar limpieza' button (clean-titles-btn) which runs and shows '0 nombres actualizados' (expected — already cleaned in previous run).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/admin/products (create_product) uses _title_case directly on body.nombre but NOT _clean_name — so dirty chars like double-quotes or trailing internal codes survive the create path. Low risk because admins rarely type those by hand, but for consistency consider calling _clean_name in create_product too.
server.py grew to 607 lines — still manageable but starts to justify splitting into routes/ (public, admin, admin_tools) + services/ modules.
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI >=0.109; migrate to lifespan context in a future pass.
Gallery remove uses native confirm() dialog (blocking, not styled); for polish consider an AlertDialog, but not a blocker.
test_credentials: Admin password 'Netri 437' (with space) — /app/backend/.env ADMIN_PASSWORD, mirrored in /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: None persisted. Every TEST_ SKU created during pytest is torn down in the fixture. UI test on SKU 6165090171123 added then removed a single TEST URL inside GalleryModal, so the product ends in its original state with 2 images.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two regression suites now exist: test_dd_api.py (27) and test_gallery_and_search.py (22). Combined run is ~6s. SKU 6165090171123 is a known multi-image product used as UI fixture. Clean-titles endpoint returns 0 updated on subsequent runs because DB is already clean — this is correct behaviour, not a bug.
rca of the issue: No outstanding bug. All 14 features from the review request verified end-to-end.
